name: skill-port-cli
description: Local Agent Skill hub and project binding CLI

scripts.lint: eslint src tests scripts apps/desktop/src apps/desktop/tests apps/desktop/*.ts
scripts.test:platform: npm run build && node --test tests/core-loop.test.js tests/link-adapter.test.js tests/target-conflict.test.js tests/tool-registry.test.js
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build && npm run start --workspace skill-port-desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && npm run package --workspace skill-port-desktop
scripts.desktop:typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspace skill-port-desktop
scripts.desktop:test: npm run build && npm run test --workspace skill-port-desktop
scripts.desktop:e2e: npm run build && npm run e2e --workspace skill-port-desktop
scripts.desktop:make: npm run build && npm run make --workspace skill-port-desktop
